message:
feat(security): expose ACIP pattern detection as public API

Add public helper functions to the ACIP module for taint checking
during pattern extraction:

- contains_injection_patterns(content: &str) -> bool
  Quick check for prompt injection patterns (disallowed patterns)

- contains_sensitive_data(content: &str) -> bool
  Quick check for sensitive data (API keys, tokens, secrets)

Re-export these functions from src/security/mod.rs for ergonomic
access via crate::security::{contains_injection_patterns, ...}

Update mining.rs to use only SafetyGate for now, with the new
public functions available for future taint tracking integration.

These functions enable the pattern extraction pipeline to detect
potentially dangerous content without instantiating the full
ACIP engine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
